content:
Your resume is well-organized and presents your background effectively. The skills section is strong, but your work experience section could be enhanced with more quantifiable achievements—specific numbers or measurable results will help demonstrate your impact. Additionally, check for consistent formatting in spacing and punctuation.

With these small refinements, your materials will be even stronger. Keep up the great work!

Best,
Professor Padavano

Grades:
• Cover Letter: 80/100
• Resume: 85/100

⸻

Letter for Jamie Gregory

Dear Jamie,

Thank you for submitting your resume and cover letter. You’ve put together strong materials, and I appreciate the effort you’ve put into them. Below is my feedback.

Your cover letter is well-written and structured effectively. You do a great job of explaining your qualifications and enthusiasm for the role, but one area where you could improve is making it more tailored to the specific job and company. Right now, the letter provides a strong general overview, but adding details about why you are drawn to this company would make it more compelling. Also, your closing paragraph could include a stronger call to action, such as requesting an interview.
context: From document: Feedback Letters for Resume & Cover Letters — chunk 21 (chunk 21/22)
